subcodes.first_line: Say: O servants of the Most Merciful throughout all lands! We counsel you, at the outset of Our utterance, to observe patience and steadfastness in whatsoever hath befallen you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا عباد الرحمن فی البلدان انا نوصیکم فی اول القول بالصبر و الاصطبار فیما ورد
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
